creator: jhein@symmetricom.com
text:
davmail-3.8.8 was released 2011-01-11.
davmail-3.9.0 was released 2011-02-22.

release notes ...
https://sourceforge.net/projects/davmail/files/davmail/3.9.0/releasenotes.txt

I saw no regressions from 3.8.7 - tested imap & pop using a 2010 exchange
server, but not yet caldav.

Fix: simple update with minor tweak in post-build to combine
two commands to one...
